news.title: Rupee slips on week as Iran flare-up spurs caution, merchant hedging
news.description: The Indian rupee ended nearly unchanged on Friday, but the week closed on a weaker note. Investor caution grew amid renewed hostilities in the Middle East, impacting oil-affiliated currencies. news.title: Christopher Wood warns of AI fatigue. Why Jefferies is turning to India and China
news.description: Christopher Wood of Jefferies warns that the AI trade is showing signs of fatigue as investors seek cheaper value opportunities. news.title: Sensex today | Stock Market Live: Sensex ends 238 points higher; Nifty closes above 23,950
news.description: Sensex, Nifty, Share Prices LIVE: Indian markets closed modestly higher, with the Sensex rising 0.31 per cent and the Nifty gaining 0.34 per cent. Advancing stocks outnumbered decliners by more than two to one, reflecting broad-based buying interest.

news.title: Oman Tells UN It’s Against Imposing Transit Fees in Hormuz
news.description: Oman told the United Nations’ shipping agency that it doesn’t support imposing transit fees in the Strait of Hormuz, an approach which might set the sultanate at odds with Iran, which is pushing to charge passing freighters for navigation.

news.title: Real-time tax technology is changing corporate finance, says Cygnet
news.description: AI, automation and e-invoicing are transforming tax operations into real-time business tools, improving compliance, cash flow, risk management and growth.

news.title: Polestar's Q2 sales volumes slide amid US market ban
news.description: Sweden's Polestar has today reported a 4% fall in quarterly sales volumes, weeks after the EV maker was handed a US market ban starting in the 2027 model year, adding to its ongoing struggles to turn a profit.
